title: Creeper AI Updated - NeoForge
description: Creepers with improved targeting, wall breaching, leaps, and powered spawns.
body:
# Creeper AI Updated

**Smarter, more dangerous creepers for NeoForge 1.21.1.**

This mod enhances vanilla creeper AI to make survival more intense and less predictable — while keeping everything fully configurable.

---

## Summary

Creepers gain improved targeting, increased awareness, optional wall-breaching behavior, leap attacks, and a configurable chance to spawn powered. Explosion fire and height-based behavior limits can also be adjusted.

Perfect for players and modpacks that want creepers to feel like a real threat again.

---

## Features

- Configurable follow range  
- Improved player targeting  
- Optional wall-breaching swell behavior  
- Optional leap attack  
- Configurable powered spawn chance  
- Optional explosion fire  
- Min/Max Y-level control for enhanced behavior  

All values can be customized in the common config file.

---

## Credits

Based on **[Creeper AI Updated](https://modrinth.com/mod/creeper-ai-updated)** by **srgnis**.  
This version is a maintained and updated NeoForge 1.21.1 adaptation.
